name: Nova Scotia Lobster Fisherman T2121 Return
description:
Complete Callum MacNeil's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. Save the completed return as 'callum_macneil.24t' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\'.

Taxpayer Information:
- Name: Callum James MacNeil (DOB: June 12, 1978, SIN: 046 294 182)
- Address: 42 Bluenose Drive, Lunenburg, NS B0J 2C0
- Marital Status: Married to Fiona Margaret MacNeil (DOB: Sept 3, 1980, SIN: 046 294 190, Net Income: $28,200)

Income and Expenses:
- T2121 Fishing Activities: Gross Revenue $128,400; Fuel and oil $18,200; Bait and ice $8,750; Crew share wages $31,400; Repairs and maintenance $6,800; Insurance $4,200; Wharf/harbour fees $2,100; Gear and supplies $3,600; DFO licences $1,850.
- CCA: Class 7 Vessel (15%) with starting UCC $85,000; Class 8 Equipment (20%) with starting UCC $14,500.
- T4 Employment (Lunenburg Sea Products Ltd.): Box 14 $14,400; Box 16 $720; Box 18 $288; Box 22 $1,440.
- Deductions and Credits: RRSP Contribution $6,000 (Jan-Mar 2024); Charitable Donation $300 (Lunenburg Heritage Society).

Reference source documents are available in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\macneil\.

metadata.data_source: CRA T2121 Form and DFO NS Landing Statistics
